column1: #FORMAT=WebAnno TSV 3.3
#T_SP=webanno.custom.CharacterMention|CharacterName
#T_RL=webanno.custom.SocialRelationship|Direction|InclusionRelationType|Modality|RelationType|BT_webanno.custom.CharacterMention
#Text=Chapter 1
#Text=What a nuisance.
#Text=Who knocks on someone’s door at almost four in the morning?
#Text=Rody’s brows furrowed as he clamped his eyes shut, hoping the knocking was simply a result of him being only half conscious and would go away.
#Text=Only when Lala tugged lightly on his nightshirt did Rody finally crack open his eyes, giving himself a moment to adjust to the darkness of the room.
#Text=“Mm, what’s wrong, Lala?”
#Text=Rody asked, sitting up in the bed that the three shared, effectively waking Roro up in the process.
#Text=Rody shot Roro an apologetic look and ruffled his hair, whispering for him to go back to sleep.
#Text=“Knocking,” Lala said, clearly upset that she was awoken from her slumber, “Woke me up.”
#Text=Then came another knock, snapping Rody out of his initial grogginess.
#Text=He hummed, motioning for Lala to try and go back to sleep as well.
#Text=Rubbing his eyes as he advanced towards the door, Rody heard a yawn from his shoulder where an equally groggy Pino sat, feathers ruffled in slight annoyance at the rude awakening.
#Text=“What?”
#Text=Rody slurred as he opened the door to their trailer, sounding a bit more rude than he intended.
#Text=There, in the chill morning breeze, stood two taller men.
#Text=One was blonde and looked almost… deflated, while the other stared at Rody with analyzing eyes, as if he was studying him.
#Text=Rody straightened his posture, intimidated by the staring, “Who are— Wait…”
#Text=Pino chirped with acknowledgement, flying up to look at the blonde closer before startling and flying back to cower in Rody’s messy head of hair.
#Text=“I know you!
#Text=You’re… You’re that hero from Japan, All Might!”
#Text=He said, panicked.
#Text=Did he do something wrong?
#Text=Rody could’ve sworn he hadn’t done
#Text=anything
#Text=illegal ever since the Humarise incident!
#Text=The blonde gave the younger boy a smile, almost amused by his skittishness.
#Text=“Calm down, boy.
#Text=Rody Soul, yes?”
#Text=Rody tensed up, unsure how to respond other than an uncharacteristically timid head nod.
#Text=Feeling a slight tug on his pajama pants, Rody looked to his side to see Roro and Lala had arrived following Rody’s unintentional shouting.
#Text=Despite his embarrassment for causing a ruckus, Rody felt calmer with his siblings by his side.
#Text=The darker haired man behind All Might finally spoke upon seeing the two children, as if he was not expecting them.
#Text=“Ah, and who are these two?”
#Text=He inquired with a raised brow, crouching down to their level.
#Text=Roro and Lala hesitated, looking up to Rody as if asking permission.
#Text=He was proud that they learned well from his ‘don’t talk to strangers’ lesson but he nodded in return.
#Text=Lala’s demeanor changed in an instant as she hopped in front of Rody and held her hand out for the dark haired man to shake, “The name’s Lala Soul!”
#Text=She grinned, far too chipper for someone who just woke up.
#Text=The interaction made the man smile ever so slightly, gently taking her hand and shaking it.
#Text=“It is nice to meet you, Lala.
#Text=My name is Aizawa Shouta.”
#Text=Lala’s face twisted in clear confusion to which the man, Aizawa, added, “…You may also call me by my hero name, Eraserhead.”
#Text=Roro hid behind his big brother, still not enthusiastic about the idea of introducing himself to these strangers.
#Text=Rody understood, and took over for him.
#Text=“And this is Roro,” The teen said simply, “What’s going on?
#Text=Shouldn’t you two be in Japan?”
#Text=Pino began to visibly fluff up with anxiety and chirp out her concerns as Rody’s mind filled with possible reasons for the two heroes being in front of his door right now.
#Text=Has something happened to that green haired fool?
#Text=Rody’s stomach twisted in knots at the thought of it.
#Text=“Right, we will get to the point,” Aizawa spoke as he stood up to his normal height, staring at Rody with serious eyes.
#Text=“There is no easy way to say this, boy… but we need you to come back to Japan with us,” All Might finished his simple explanation.
#Text=The brunette teen stared at the two heroes quizzically, “You’re gonna need to explain more than that!”
#Text=His nerves getting the better of him.
#Text=Aizawa sighed and put a hand on All Might’s shoulder, letting him know that he would handle it.
#Text=All Might understood and stepped back.
#Text=The tired teacher crouched down again to cover Lala’s ears gently, to which Rody followed suit with Roro.
#Text=He assumed that whatever it is, Roro and Lala didn’t need to spend their time worrying about it.
#Text=“Rody, we believe you and your siblings may be in danger.

#Text=Flect Turn was defeated as you know, but we have gained some intel that Humarise members may still be at large and looking for revenge,” Aizawa explained in a serious tone, genuine concern for the seemingly defenseless teen seeping through.
#Text=All Might chimed in, nodding, “All our young heroes are safe at UA and they can handle themselves just fine, but it’s you we are worried about.

column4: young heroes[40]|All Might and Aizawa Shouta[41]

column1: #Text=You were the one who stopped the trigger bombs altogether.
#Text=It is absolutely necessary that you come with us.”
#Text=Rody’s heart plummeted into his stomach, what the hell?
#Text=He couldn’t care less if he was in danger really, but the thought of his innocent siblings getting caught in the crossfire of this whole mess was something truly upsetting to Rody.
#Text=Lala squirmed and laughed while Aizawa covered her ears, blissfully unaware of what the three were really talking about.
#Text=“Wh— But where would we…” Rody trailed off, his voice laced with concern.
#Text=“That’s why the principal of UA wants to help you.
#Text=Nezu is aware of your situation and wishes for you to be kept personally protected in UA’s very own dorms, but only if you attend UA’s General Studies course.

#Text=He has been looking for a student to fill an empty spot as it seems,” All Might sounded gravely serious, unlike anything Rody had ever heard from watching a few All Might videos online when he was younger.
#Text=It unnerved Rody to no end.
#Text=“And my siblings?
#Text=I’m not leaving them!”
#Text=Rody put his foot down, he would never leave Roro and Lala again.

#Text=Another half smile flashed across Aizawa’s face but was gone in an instant, “There is no need to worry, there is another little girl staying at UA that would love to have some friends her age around.”
#Text=The teen gulped, this was a pretty big decision he was making here.
#Text=It was times like these when Rody remembered that he was still a kid too and honestly… He really wished his dad were here right now.
#Text=“We must leave soon, the faster you’re at UA, the safer you will be, Rody,” All Might placed a comforting hand on his shoulder, then spoke again, “Young Midoriya has missed you, you know?

column4: Rody, Roro, Lala, All Might, and Aizawa

column1: #Text=He talks about you a lot.”
#Text=Rody wouldn’t let himself outright blush at that, but it didn’t stop Pino from letting out a chirp of embarrassment as her cheeks flushed.
#Text=Stupid bird…
#Text=A sigh escaped the brunette’s lips as he released his hands from Roro’s ears, Aizawa following suit.
#Text=“Roro, Lala, we’re gonna go on a trip, okay?”
#Text=Rody grinned, with as much vigor as he could muster given the situation, “Why don’t you pull out that old suitcase in the closet and put all your things in there, yeah?”
#Text=Lala enthusiastically nodded and pulled her brother Roro along to the back room of the small trailer to pack their things.
#Text=“Would you like some time alone, boy?
#Text=We understand this is a big change.
#Text=It will take some getting used to,” All Might said with the same tone of voice that he used to calm Midoriya down once or twice, hoping it’d help somewhat.
#Text=“No, I—“ Rody tripped over his words, a bit too shocked to properly express himself.
#Text=After a couple of deep breaths, he continued, “I’m… It’s okay.
#Text=I’ll do anything to keep my family safe.”
#Text=The two heroes shared a glance.
#Text=If All Might noticed the shaking bird on Rody’s shoulder, he didn’t comment on it.
#Text=“Alright then.
#Text=We will wait here, whenever you’re ready.”
#Text=Rody disappeared from the doorway to go look after his siblings, who were arguing over what to pack.
#Text=“Woah, what’s going on here?”
#Text=He asked, physically separating them.
#Text=“Roro wants to bring his nerdy stuff… We’re going on vacation, aren’t we?
#Text=How ridiculous is that?!”
#Text=Lala whined, to which Roro stuck his tongue out at her.
#Text=“Yeah, well, she used her quirk on me!”
#Text=Roro pointed fingers, causing Rody to let out a dramatically fake gasp, “Lala!”
#Text=He exclaimed.
#Text=Lala giggled at Rody’s (admittedly very bad) acting and then turned to Roro, “Sorry!
#Text=I jus’ want you to relax a bit!”
#Text=Her apology laced with a bite.
#Text=Roro glared and crossed his arms but quickly got over it.
#Text=The pit in Rody’s stomach only grew, these kids shouldn’t have to bear this burden.

#Text=Placing a hand on each of their shoulders, Rody gave them both a tired look, “Look, you two… This may be a bit longer of a trip than you think…” He bit his lip, unsure of how to put it lightly for them, “We’ll probably be gone for a little while… but I promise you’ll have fun!”
#Text=Lala looked unphased, clearly paying more attention to what she wanted to bring than on Rody’s words, while Roro began to look more worried.
#Text=“Where… are we going?”
#Text=He asked, unsure if he really wanted to know the answer.
#Text=Rody chuckled, “We’re going to go see Deku!”
#Text=An attempt at lightening the mood.
#Text=It seemed to do the trick as both kids lit up with excitement almost instantaneously that it nearly startled Pino off Rody’s shoulder.

#Text=“Alright, now don’t dally, those two heroes out there are waiting for us,” He spoke with gentleness in his tone, exiting the back room to grab some of his aerodynamics books left on the kitchen table from studying the night before.
#Text=Under all the books lay a couple of Japanese language learning guides, which Rody had been studying periodically as well in the short time since the Humarise incident.
#Text=He guessed maybe that was a good decision on his part given the new situation at hand.
#Text=When Rody returned to place his belongings in the suitcase, he saw Lala standing on the bed, attempting to take one of her drawings off the wall.
#Text=Rody smiled and strolled over, helping her detach the paper carefully before inquiring, “Whatcha doin’ there, Lala?”
#Text=She puffed up her cheeks and held up the drawing, which was of three familiar heroes, “I wanna give it to Deku!
#Text=Duh!”
#Text=He snorted at Lala’s expression and nodded in understanding.
#Text=“Are you all ready to go?
#Text=Roro?”
#Text=Turning his gaze over to the other side of the room where Roro stood trying to decide which books he should take with him.
#Text=Snapped out of his thoughts, Roro nodded and skipped over to dump his belongings into the suitcase.
#Text=“Right then, let’s go!”

#Text=Rody grabbed the suitcase with one arm and picked up Lala in the other, who was already falling asleep again from the usage of her quirk on Roro earlier, “You two can get some more rest on the plane, yeah?”
#Text=“Is that all?”
#Text=All Might raised his brow when Rody stepped outside the trailer.
#Text=The teen’s face flushed in embarrassment and All Might issued a small apology after realizing his rudeness.
#Text=“There is no time to waste, we will brief you more on the plane,” Aizawa stated with urgency.
#Text=Rody was in a daze as he followed the two heroes, only really snapping out of it when Roro tugged on his pants lightly or when Lala made little noises in her sleep.
#Text=He was sure the darker haired man, Aizawa, was speaking, but it all went in one ear and out the other.
#Text=Before he knew it, Rody was sitting across from the two heroes, with his siblings snoring softly by his side, looking out the window as Otheon disappeared behind them.

column4: Rody, Roro, Lala, All Might, and Aizawa

column1: #Text=Some part of Rody felt… relief.
#Text=Otheon, though it was his home country, had brought so much pain to him and his family in the past, that it was almost refreshing watching it get smaller as they flew away.

column4: Rody, Roro, Lala, All Might, and Aizawa

column1: #Text=However, this feeling of relief was overpowered by dread of the looming danger his family was in.
#Text=Rody cursed himself for getting involved with that damn hero, though Pino chimed in, reminding Rody that he harbored no real angry feelings towards the green haired boy.
#Text=It pissed him off anyway.
#Text=“Rody?
#Text=Rody!”
#Text=Aizawa raised his voice, but there was nothing angry in his tone.
#Text=Rody turned to look at the man, his eyes half lidded and tired, “You have not been listening, have you?”
#Text=Rody nodded bluntly, which caused All Might to let out a laugh as Aizawa gave the teen a scandalized look, clearly not used to that behavior.
#Text=“Ah, sorry,” The brunette said dumbly, still slightly out of it, “Jus’ thinking, y’know.”

#Text=Aizawa stared at the teen for a moment before nodding in understanding and continuing on with his explanation, “I’m sure you have a lot of questions, but before all that, please be rest assured that UA will keep you and your family completely safe, you have no reason to be worried.”
#Text=“I’m not—!”
#Text=Rody protested, then quieted down when Roro stirred in his sleep, “He told you, didn’t he?
#Text=About my quirk?
#Text=What a nuisance.”
#Text=All Might didn’t comment, giving Midoriya a sense of privacy, especially since it was an accident on account of him overhearing the green haired boy mumbling about Rody more than a few times.
#Text=It’d be rude to expose him like that.
#Text=“No,” Aizawa answered simply, “I just guessed.
#Text=You are like an open book with that bird there.”
#Text=Rody’s face flushed, embarrassment obvious even without Pino’s help.
#Text=“Just… don’t go telling anyone.
#Text=Sorry… Guess I shoulda trusted Deku more,” he apologized, though it was more to himself, knowing that he still needed to work on trusting others.
#Text=“Ugh, I feel like you guys know more about me than I know about you, it’s pretty awkward,” Rody admitted, sheepishly.
#Text=He hated getting analyzed.
#Text=“I know who you are, Deku told me about you,” The teen pointed to All Might, “He’s like your number one fan, I think.
#Text=It’s almost endearing, really.”
#Text=The former number one hero spared another chuckle, well aware of Midoriya’s admiration towards him.
#Text=Aizawa’s expression was deadpan, “Right, I should’ve introduced myself properly.
#Text=I am Class 1-A’s heroics teacher and Midoriya is one of my students.”
#Text=“1-A?”
#Text=Rody inquired, it’s been awhile since he has attended any school at all.
#Text=He hoped he wouldn’t be too far behind, no matter how smart he was.

#Text=“UA is separated into different classes and you will be placed into Class 1-C, replacing a General Studies student that just recently transferred to 1-A,” Rody felt like he should’ve been taking notes from how much information Aizawa was dropping right now.

#Text=“Aizawa, I think you’re overwhelming him,” All Might commented as he shot a look towards Pino, who looked puzzled and dazed, “Not to worry, boy, you will be given time to prepare before attending UA.
#Text=It would be rude of us to throw you into this immediately.”
#Text=To nobody’s surprise, Rody’s nerves were not calmed one bit.
#Text=Attempting to take the attention off of himself, Rody pointed towards Aizawa again, “If you’re a teacher, shouldn’t you be, y’know… teaching?
#Text=Isn’t it like one in the afternoon there?”
#Text=Rody tried not to think about how he just exposed the fact that he memorized the time difference.
#Text=That definitely wasn’t important right now.
#Text=“I was personally requested by Principal Nezu to come retrieve you with All Might.
#Text=Since you will be staying in the 1-A dorms, you will be seeing a lot of me,” Aizawa scoffed, “There is a teacher in my place, of course.”
#Text=The teen crossed his arms and slumped down in his seat, looking back out the window.
#Text=Pino yawned and hopped off Rody’s shoulder to go nest in Lala’s hair.
#Text=“Get some rest, boy.
#Text=There is a long plane ride ahead of you,” All Might said in a caring tone, empathetic of the boy’s current situation.
#Text=Rody just hummed in acknowledgment.
#Text=Somehow he was no longer tired, “Mm, yeah whatever.”
#Text=The rest of the plane ride was uneventful.
#Text=Roro and Lala awoke periodically to make small talk with Aizawa and All Might, but eventually fell back asleep after a few minutes.

#Text=By the time the plane had landed, Lala was leaning against Roro as she snored while Roro silently flipped through the pages of a book he was reading, occasionally kicking his legs excitedly when he got to a section he enjoyed.
#Text=Giving Roro a tired smile, Rody gently picked up Lala’s sleeping figure and let Roro grab his other free hand, squeezing it to give the younger boy some comfort.
#Text=“Worry not, Young Roro, I believe you will like it at UA, there is lots to do there,” All Might explained as they walked.

column4: Rody, Roro, Lala, All Might, and Aizawa

column1: #Text=Over the course of the flight, Roro had become more comfortable talking, especially to All Might, who he had come to admire in the admittedly short time they’d been together.
#Text=“Can you tell me some more hero stories?”
#Text=The former pro hero chuckled, amusement in his tone, “Of course, but let’s get you settled in first, okay?”
#Text=To which Roro nodded enthusiastically.
#Text=Rody had seen the school while flying over, but standing in front of it made him feel so small.
#Text=Did he really belong here?
#Text=The teen found himself squeezing Roro’s hand again, though this time it was for his own comfort.
#Text=Pino was energetic despite Rody’s outward appearance, and it was clear that she was anxiously awaiting something or
#Text=someone
#Text=.
#Text=After a few attempts at flying ahead (even though she had no idea where she was going), Rody had confined her to his shirt pocket so as to not lose her.
#Text=This damn bird was embarrassing him again.
#Text=When would he ever get a break?
#Text=Even though he didn’t want to admit it, excitement bubbled inside of Rody’s stomach.
#Text=He would be able to see Midoriya everyday.
#Text=It made him sick with butterflies.
#Text=Once more, Rody zoned out, his body on autopilot as they made their way through UA’s halls.

column4: Rody, Roro, Lala, All Might, and Aizawa
Rody, Roro, Lala, All Might, and Aizawa

column1: #Text=He was pretty sure All Might had said something about having to go see Principal Nezu first, but Rody wasn’t really interested in that.
#Text=His mind wandered as he observed the scenery, tidy halls and a pretty view outside the window.
#Text=It almost calmed Rody to look at.
#Text=Almost
#Text=.
#Text=It was early morning on a Sunday, so Rody assumed that’s why the school was so quiet.
#Text=Principal Nezu was an interesting character, Rody thought as he watched him and the two heroes discuss his situation.
#Text=He didn’t get much time to get to know him however, because just as soon as they got there, he found himself being dragged somewhere else.

column4: Rody, Roro, Lala, All Might, and Aizawa

column1: #Text=Jeez, this was probably gonna be the longest day of his life.
#Text=Rody regretted not sleeping on the plane as he felt his body start to grow weary from lack of sleep, stress, and jet lag.
#Text=Even Pino was starting to doze off, chirping weakly every now and then to keep herself awake.
#Text=In the distance stood several buildings, one notably smaller than the others.
#Text=“We’ll get Roro and Lala settled in first, is that okay?”
#Text=All Might inquired, snapping Rody out of his daze.
#Text=“Eh?
#Text=Do you mean they won’t be staying with me?”
#Text=Rody wasn’t exactly sure he was comfortable with that, “I don’t know if I—“
#Text=The teen was cut off by a small tug on his hand.
#Text=Roro looked up at Rody and smiled, “It’s alright, I’ll protect Lala!”
#Text=he stated, with determination in his voice, causing Rody to let out a genuine laugh.
#Text=“You’ll both be safe here, but are you sure you can handle sleeping away from me?
#Text=It’s okay if not,” Rody crouched down, setting down a now awake Lala, who was rubbing her eyes, still groggy.
#Text=Roro had newfound confidence, grabbing Lala’s hand, “Yeah!
#Text=We’re big kids!”
#Text=There was a sad smile on Rody’s face, and his heart panged.
#Text=Roro is almost twelve years old now, time really does fly.
#Text=It scared Rody a little.
#Text=With a sigh, Rody stood up and gave his siblings a goofy grin, “Right then!
#Text=Let’s go.
#Text=Hold your sister’s hand tight so she doesn’t go running off, yeah?”
#Text=The buildings had some distance between them, but Rody assumed it was for privacy.
#Text=The tinier building was more secluded and homey than the other dorms, as if it wasn’t really made for more than a few people.
#Text=All Might politely held the door open for the group.
#Text=Muttering a ‘thank you’ as he walked in, Rody was met with a huge front room.
#Text=The walls were a calming baby blue color and unused toys were scattered about the floor.
#Text=It looked like some kind of huge playroom.
#Text=In the corner sat a little girl with white hair, coloring at an arts and crafts table.
#Text=She hadn’t noticed the group walk in until Aizawa called her name in a gentle tone, the same he used with Lala earlier.

column4: Rody, Roro, Lala, All Might, and Aizawa[141]
Rody, Roro, Lala, All Might, and Aizawa[141]

column1: #Text=“Eri, there’s some people I’d like you to meet, is that alright with you?”
#Text=Aizawa asked permission, walking over to her, “They’ll be staying with you for a while.”
#Text=The little girl, Eri, turned her gaze over to where Roro and Lala stood, looking quite shy and intimidated.
#Text=Lala was practically bursting with excitement as she hopped over to the table, holding out her hand, “Hi there!
#Text=I’m Lala!
#Text=Can I draw with you?
#Text=I love drawing, what are you drawing?”
#Text=Roro stumbled after his sister, trying to calm her down, realizing how stressed the little girl looked.
#Text=“Ah, sorry,” He apologized in a calm voice, as to not startle Eri any further, “She just likes making new friends… I’m Roro.”
#Text=Eri glanced at Aizawa, as if asking if it was safe.
#Text=He nodded and she turned back to where Lala’s hand was still outstretched, gently grabbing it and shaking it.
#Text=“Eri,” She stated simply, unsure what else to say.
#Text=“Can I draw with you?”
#Text=Lala repeated her question, already sitting opposite of Eri at the table.
#Text=Getting more used to smiling, Eri nodded and passed a piece of paper to the other girl.
#Text=“You too?”
#Text=Eri asked politely, holding out a blank sheet for Roro.
#Text=Rody decided that the scene was too sweet for him to disrupt, so he took it upon himself to unpack his sibling’s belongings for them.
#Text=The room Roro and Lala were going to share was pretty standard, supplied with two kid’s beds and a bedside table with a lamp on it inbetween.
#Text=It reminded Rody of his sibling’s old bedroom, from when Dad was still around.
#Text=With wistful eyes, Rody began to unpack his sibling’s belongings, placing them in their respective areas of the room.
#Text=“Are you sure you’re alright, young man?”
#Text=All Might chimed in, watching the teen from the doorway.
#Text=“You’re much more quiet than Young Midoriya described you as.”
#Text=Rody’s eye twitched, moment ruined.
#Text=“How flattering,” He said sarcastically, though Pino seemed a bit upset by the comment.

#Text=All Might seemed unphased by Rody’s response, continuing, “My apologies, Young Midoriya is just very fond of you as it seems, I doubt there’s a single soul in the dorms that doesn’t know of you at this point.”
#Text=He wasn’t sure if he should be happy or intimidated by that, honestly.
#Text=Pino had chosen for him, chirping enthusiastically with an unmistakable blush on her cheeks.
#Text=Rody gently grabbed Pino and placed her back in his shirt pocket, attempting to sound cooler than he actually felt at the moment, “Is that so?
#Text=Well then, guess I shouldn’t keep my Hero waiting any long—“
#Text=Just then, a commotion was heard in the playroom, cutting Rody off entirely.
#Text=Heading towards the noise in a panic, he was relieved to find that his siblings were okay, still coloring at the table and chatting with Eri.
#Text=Another brunette stood at the door in pajamas, looking tired and worried.
#Text=She had a noticeable bedhead and rosy cheeks, her words exuding urgency.
#Text=Jogging over, Rody made himself known, “What’s goin’ on?”
#Text=He inquired, genuinely curious.
#Text=The brunette girl glanced towards Rody, acknowledging him before turning back to Aizawa.
#Text=“Aizawa-sensei!
#Text=Thank goodness you’re back, Kaminari is—“ She was cut off by a deep sigh from Aizawa, who seemed genuinely pissed off.
#Text=The sight made Rody chuckle anxiously.

#Text=“Don’t even continue, Uraraka, thank you for informing me,” The jaded teacher pinched the bridge of his nose and looked at Rody, who straightened his back upon eye contact, “You, you’re coming with me.
#Text=It’s time for you to see where you’ll be staying.”

#Text=Another nervous chuckle escaped his lips as Pino attempted to hide herself in his hair, “Alright then…” He turned to Roro and Lala who waved goodbye, however, they seemed preoccupied chatting with Eri who had seemed to become more talkative as time went on, “I’ll check on you two later!”
#Text=Aizawa angrily stomped out of the kid’s dorm, with Rody and the girl, who he assumed was named Uraraka, following close behind.
#Text=The walk wasn’t long, but it felt like an eternity to Rody who was currently being stared down with curious eyes by the girl beside him.
#Text=Suddenly something clicked in her eyes and she gasped loudly, “Oh my god!”
#Text=Pino jumped, letting out a startled noise.
#Text=“You’re Rody!
#Text=What are you doing here?!”
#Text=She asked, a huge smile on her face.
#Text=The question confused him, “Huh?
#Text=You mean you don’t know?”
#Text=Uraraka paused, stopping in her tracks, “Is this why Aizawa-sensei has been gone?
#Text=And what did he mean by ‘staying’ earlier?
#Text=What’s going on?”
#Text=Man, Rody really wanted the answers to these questions too if he was totally honest.
#Text=Sighing, he placed a hand on the girl’s shoulder, as if to ask her to hold her horses.

#Text=“Hey, woah, calm down there, you’re asking way too many questions,” He spoke, scratching the back of his neck, “I know just about as much as you do… Hey wait, does that green haired fool not even know I’m here?!”
#Text=Rody gave the girl a frazzled look, gaining a laugh in return, “Now look who’s asking too many questions!
#Text=Oh, Deku will be so happy!”
#Text=Uraraka’s curiosity seemed to dissipate as she grabbed Rody’s palm and booked it towards the dorms, where audible yelling and laughter was heard inside.
#Text=“Jeez… It’s like seven in the morning…” Rody commented, a bit of annoyance present in his tone, to which Uraraka returned with another laugh, “Oh, this?
#Text=It’s normal.
#Text=Try not to be too intimidated.”
#Text=Rody took slight offense to that, “Wh— I am
#Text=not
#Text=intimidated!”
#Text=His cheeks blushing a light pink, hoping it wasn’t obvious.
#Text=“Shinsou!
#Text=Stop encouraging him!”
#Text=Aizawa yelled from inside.
#Text=A snicker came in response as who Rody assumed was Shinsou, answered, “Mm, fine, old man.”
#Text=After being dragged inside by Uraraka, Rody got a good look at the chaos unfolding in the common room.
#Text=A blonde haired teen stood on the coffee table looking a little dazed, both his hands in a thumbs up gesture.
#Text=A bunch of other teens stood around him, some laughing and others trying to get the boy down safely.
#Text=Another student with wild purple hair stood a bit further away from the crowd, holding his phone out and laughing with the others.
#Text=Rody squinted, unsure if he was even seeing things correctly.
#Text=This
#Text=is a class of upcoming heroes?
#Text=He leaned down to Uraraka, whispering, “Think I can get some sleep in before I have to deal with this mess?”
#Text=It was partly a joke, but really, Rody wouldn’t have minded taking a nap before having to socialize.
#Text=“Ha, not a chance,” She responded, linking her arm in his, making sure he had no means of escape.
#Text=“Wh— Hey, are all you heroes so damn annoying all the time?”
#Text=Rody yelped as he got pulled forward unexpectedly, failing to break free, “Jesus, you’re strong…”
#Text=Attention was now on the two brunettes as they each fought to move in different directions.
#Text=Uraraka laughed as she pressed her palm to Rody’s shoulder, immediately rendering the teen airborne.
#Text=Panic spread across his face as he flailed, unaware of Uraraka’s quirk until that moment.
#Text=Pino began jumping on Rody’s back in an attempt to get him down, chirping frantically.
#Text=And in a second, it was over, and Rody found himself falling face first on the ground as Aizawa glared daggers at the girl, who looked sheepish.
#Text=Now Rody’s face hurt, and he almost didn’t want to get up from his spot on the floor, especially since the entire room was most likely staring at him right now.
#Text=He heard rushed footsteps pound towards him, then a familiar voice asked, “Rody!
#Text=My goodness, are you okay?”
#Text=Looking up, he was met with worried green eyes staring into his own.
#Text=“Never been better, hero,” Rody grinned, a metallic taste now seeping into his mouth as his nose bled from the impact of the fall, “What an entrance though, eh?”
#Text=He accented his words with a lighthearted laugh, attempting to raise the mood a little.
#Text=Midoriya stared dumbfounded, before breaking into a fit of laughter, tears forming at the corners of his eyes, “What are you doing here?”
#Text=Putting his hand to his nose in an attempt to delay the bleeding, Rody opened his mouth to answer, but was cut off by a booming voice belonging to a darker haired teen with glasses.
#Text=“Ah, he’s finally arrived.
#Text=Yaoyorozu, would you do the honors?”
#Text=He spoke, gaining everyone’s attention instantly.
#Text=The girl, Yaoyorozu, nodded and smiled sweetly at Rody as she turned her attention towards the curious class.
#Text=“Everyone!
#Text=Please welcome the dorm’s newest resident, Rody Soul from Otheon!”
#Text=Chapter 2
#Text=Chapter Notes
#Text=ty again to my beta readers lexi and adrien!!
#Text=and ty all for being patient with me while i write this fic!
#Text=i have several future chapters planned so stay tuned!
#Text=enjoy this chapter that i definitely made more gay than intended
#Text=The common room erupted into chaos almost instantaneously after the words left Yaoyorozu’s mouth.
#Text=Midoriya immediately started to hang off Iida’s side, whining about how he should’ve been the first one to know about this.
#Text=“My apologies, Midoriya, but I was informed that it was a secret in order to protect Rody’s whereabouts,” He explained, adjusting his glasses.
#Text=This only made Midoriya whine more, shaking the taller teen.
#Text=Yaoyorozu had crouched down to look over Rody’s injuries, creating a few tissues from her left arm.
#Text=“Oh dear, are you alright?”
#Text=She fussed, handing the tissues over to him, which Pino politely took, happily chirping out to her in return.

#Text=The bleeding wasn’t the worst injury Rody had experienced in his life, but it was still a bit frustrating to deal with, especially since it had already bled onto his plain white t-shirt, “Shit, this was one of my best shirts…” He complained, holding the tissues to his nose in an attempt to stop the bleeding.
#Text=The class looked on in curiosity, crowding around Aizawa and battering him with questions.
#Text=The teacher, however, looked unphased as he stared them down.
#Text=Once Iida had broken free of Midoriya’s grip, he commanded the class to settle down, “Everyone, please!
#Text=I understand you must have many questions but if you would just sit down, Aizawa-sensei will explain.”
#Text=With Yaoyorozu’s assistance, Iida managed to calm the class down enough to sit together on the common room couches.
#Text=Midoriya had returned to Rody’s side, attempting to help him up.
#Text=“Hero, I can stand by myself, y’know?
#Text=It’s just a bloody nose,” He said with annoyance, though Pino told a different story as she happily nested into Midoriya’s curly hair.
#Text=Midoriya’s expression was akin to that of a kicked puppy, Rody thought as his heart skipped a beat.
#Text=How embarrassing.
#Text=“Ah…  Whatever,” Rody mumbled in a defeated tone.
#Text=The green haired teen’s demeanor changed in an instant, giving Rody a warm smile as they joined the rest of the group.
#Text=Not that Rody minded, but he definitely didn’t remember Midoriya being this clingy during their time on the run.
#Text=Had he really missed Rody that much?
#Text=The thought made Pino coo happily, nuzzling her beak further into Midoriya’s hair.
#Text=“Rody,” Aizawa called, “Come here.”
#Text=It was a simple but direct command, which Rody followed instantly, letting go of Midoriya to stand by the teacher’s side.
#Text=If Rody noticed Midoriya’s hand lingering just a few seconds too long on his own, he didn’t mention it.
#Text=The brunette could practically feel eyes boring holes into him as the entire class looked on, anxiously awaiting for answers to their questions.
#Text=“I’m sure you are all aware of who Rody Soul is at this point,” Aizawa began, “Whether it be as the one who ultimately stopped the trigger bombs or as Midoriya’s friend, it does not matter.”
#Text=A girl with pink hair and horns giggled quietly, but stopped upon being nudged in the side by Uraraka, who seemed to be holding back giggles herself.

#Text=“A week ago, UA caught wind of some reliable intel claiming that Humarise members may still be at large even after Flect Turn’s defeat,” The room was deathly silent, “Principal Nezu has faith in you young heroes to be able to protect yourselves, however, he became worried for the safety of Rody.
#Text=In an effort to solve a few problems at once, Nezu requested to escort Rody and his family here where they will stay in protective custody for the time being.”

#Text=Aizawa scanned the room, his eyes soon locking on the brunette teen standing next to him, who seemed to be zoning out again, “Hey, listen up, problem child,” he spoke, grabbing Rody by the ear as if he were scolding his own child.
#Text=“Ow!
#Text=Okay, I’m listening!
#Text=Jeez, Mr.
#Text=Aizawa…” He whined, causing the class to erupt into laughter, killing the serious atmosphere completely.

#Text=“Good, because this part is extremely important,” Aizawa sighed tiredly, releasing the teen’s ear, “Rody is not to leave UA’s grounds unless personally escorted by a licensed Pro Hero, and that is only under emergency circumstances.
#Text=Do I make myself absolutely clear?
#Text=”
#Text=A couple of nervous chuckles escaped from the group, the majority nodding their heads in understanding.
#Text=“Good.
#Text=Now I trust that you can go the rest of the day without causing havoc here, please?”

#Text=The teacher pinched the bridge of his nose, not waiting for an answer before he turned to Rody, “Your dorm is on the fourth floor at the end of the hall on the left, someone will probably help you.”
#Text=Not wanting to answer any more questions, Aizawa swiftly left the building, mumbling something about needing a nap.
#Text=“Eh, you’re telling me I have to room next to Birdbrain over there?!”
#Text=A teen standing behind one of the couches, who Rody recognized as Bakugo, shouted furiously, his hands beginning to spark.
#Text=“No thanks, I think I’d rather die…” Rody mumbled, causing Bakugo to become even more livid.
#Text=Another teen beside him with spiky red hair attempted to hold him back while the pink haired girl from before nearly fell to the ground laughing.
#Text=The blonde teen who was previously dazed now looked back to normal as he made his way towards Rody with a grin, “I like this guy!
#Text=The name’s Kaminari Denki, nice to meet ya!”
#Text=Attempting to settle the class down again, Iida began to shout orders, “Everyone, please do not crowd him!
#Text=I’m sure he is very exhausted from his flight, it is rude to bombard him like this.”
#Text=Yaoyorozu smiled sweetly as she looked at Rody, her hands delicately placed in her lap, “Yes, if you would like some time to straighten up your room and take a nap, the introductions can wait.”

#Text=Admittedly, Rody was on the verge of passing out, and the only thing preventing his legs from giving out on him was the pure adrenaline coursing through his body at the moment, “Nah, let’s get introductions out of the way,” Ignoring his tiredness, Rody looked at Kaminari and put a hand on his shoulder.
#Text=“Nice to meet ya too, Kaminari.
#Text=You okay there?
#Text=You looked like shit when I walked in,” He commented boldly, causing more laughter to escape from the class.
#Text=“Just blew a fuse or two!
#Text=My quirk, y’know,” The teen answered, sending a tiny shock through Rody’s fingertips out of spite for the comment.
#Text=On the brightside, it woke him up a bit.
#Text=Another familiar teen walked up to him, giving a tiny smile, “It’s nice to see you alive and well, Rody.”
#Text=“Ah… Todoroki, right?
#Text=Thank you… I’m glad to see you’re doing better too, you’re crazy strong!”
#Text=The girl with horns, who introduced herself as Mina, put herself into their conversation, “Says the guy who saved all our asses!
#Text=And you didn’t even use a quirk to do it!”
#Text=The compliment made Rody shy away, not used to being genuinely praised.
#Text=“Probably wouldn’t have been able to do it without Deku’s help, y’know, he faced Flect Turn head on.”
#Text=Midoriya hugged Rody from behind, lifting him up easily while sporting a huge grin on his face, clearly excited at simply being in Rody’s presence, “Don’t sell yourself short, Rody!
#Text=I couldn’t have stopped the bombs in time if it weren’t for you!”
#Text=Pino hid her face in Midoriya’s hair, clearly overwhelmed and embarrassed by the praise.
#Text=“Oh, speaking of quirks, you have one, don’t you, Rody?”
#Text=Mina asked curiously, causing Rody to freeze up.
#Text=“It’s not important,” He answered softly, lightly tapping Midoriya’s hand, signaling for him to let him down.
#Text=The pink haired girl groaned, clearly not satisfied by the answer, “Midoriya, you must know, right?
#Text=Tell us!”
#Text=“Oh,” Midoriya held his hand up to his head for Pino to walk on to, petting her as he handed her back to Rody, who looked a little hurt, “That’s not my place to say.”
#Text=“What is this?!
#Text=Midoriya refusing to talk about quirks?
#Text=Did Flect Turn knock you around too much?!”
#Text=Kaminari shouted out, his mouth agape.
#Text=Rody just watched as Midoriya was drilled for answers on the brunette’s mysterious quirk.
#Text=To Midoriya’s credit, he didn’t budge, which made Rody mouth a
#Text=‘thank you’
#Text=towards him.

#Text=“Okay, everyone… That’s enough please,” Yaoyorozu said as she stood between Midoriya and their classmates begging for answers, “I’m sure Rody will tell us whenever he is comfortable with it, but for now, let’s all go around and properly introduce ourselves.”
#Text=Reluctantly, the class sat back down, some still staring at Rody, as if they were trying to study him.
#Text=Rody defensively hugged Pino to his chest, to which she chirped back in protest, wanting to be let loose and most likely nest in Midoriya’s hair again, where she seemed to feel the most safe.
#Text=Taking a seat next to Midoriya, Rody leaned back into the soft couch cushions, listening quietly as everyone took turns introducing themselves and their quirks.
#Text=After the initial excitement of the morning, the class eventually dispersed, everyone breaking off to do their own things.
#Text=It was a relief for Rody, who felt as if a weight had been taken off his shoulders.
#Text=Midoriya had stayed by his side, chatting with Uraraka and another girl he remembered as Tsuyu.
#Text=Comforted by the familiar tone of Midoriya’s voice, Rody felt himself beginning to drift off to sleep as his eyelids fluttered shut.
#Text=Now situated in Midoriya’s palm, Pino began to visibly droop, her tired movements mimicking how wiped out Rody currently felt.
#Text=This didn’t go unnoticed as Midoriya turned to his side, spotting the dozing teen.
#Text=He looked very peaceful, Midoriya thought as he smiled.
#Text=Not wanting to risk being caught staring, he quickly turned back to the two girls, placing his pointer finger to his lips.
#Text=“Look,” he whispered, capturing the girls’ attention.
#Text=“Can’t blame him,” Tsuyu ribbited, “I remember how tired I was when I got back from Paris.”
#Text=Uraraka, however, changed the subject quickly, grabbing Tsuyu’s hand and gently tugging it, “Tsu, I’m hungry, let’s go, yeah?”
#Text=The frog-like girl gave Uraraka a puzzled look, before suddenly understanding her intentions, waving goodbye to Midoriya.
#Text=With a bewildered expression on his face, Midoriya waved back, not understanding the girls’ sudden departure.
#Text=He wasn’t given much time to think on it before he felt more movement in his hands.
#Text=Glancing down, Midoriya saw Pino yawn, nuzzling her beak into his thumb.
#Text=Soft laughter escaped the teen’s lips as he patted Pino’s head, his heart swelling with affection.
#Text=Placing her on his shoulder, he turned to Rody and shook him gently, “Rody, wake up.”
#Text=“Mm… five more minutes?”
#Text=He asked, his words slurred as he was still half asleep.

#Text=“I know for a fact that these couches are not all that comfortable to fall asleep on,” Midoriya shook him again, this time with Pino’s assistance as she tried to chirp loud enough to wake him fully, “Let’s get you to your room, yeah?
#Text=I’ll carry you if I have to.”
#Text=Rody opened one eye to look at Midoriya expectantly before closing it again, pretending to sleep.
#Text=The smile on his face was giving away his cover though.

#Text=Midoriya was having none of it as he forcefully pulled Rody up, watching him slump onto his shoulder, “Oh, you’ll survive, come on now,” The green haired teen rolled his eyes as Rody let out a muffled laugh.

#Text=The trip up to Rody’s new room wasn’t long, nor was his suitcase very heavy, but Midoriya still insisted on carrying it for him, talking Rody’s ears off about what had happened since they last saw each other.
#Text=Sure, Rody was exhausted, but he made sure to listen to every word, invested in watching the boy next to him speak.
#Text=“Woah, I get to live here?”
#Text=Rody asked as he opened the door to his dorm, slightly amazed at how cozy it was compared to his previous sleeping arrangements back at home in Otheon.
#Text=“This is how all of our rooms started out, you can decorate it however you want,” Midoriya commented as he stepped into the room, placing Rody’s suitcase to the side.
#Text=“Oh yeah?
#Text=Don’t think I have much to decorate with,” Rody hummed, rummaging through his suitcase, “Besides, I like it right now anyway.”
#Text=Midoriya looked around, unsatisfied by the plainness of the room, thinking it lacked anything Rody-like.
#Text=He didn’t push it, however.

#Text=“That reminds me though,” The brunette finally found what he was looking for as he pulled out a carefully preserved piece of paper for Midoriya to take, “Lala wanted to give this to you, make sure to thank her later, she’s been so excited to see you again actually.”

#Text=Midoriya gripped the piece of paper, which had a crude children’s drawing on it of Bakugo, Todoroki, and himself, trying not to let tears fall as he hugged it to his chest, “I’ll definitely make sure to cherish it!”
#Text=He proclaimed excitedly.
#Text=Rody chuckled weakly, “I
#Text=know
#Text=you will, Hero,” he yawned, “You always make good on your promises.”
#Text=He flopped onto the bed, practically sinking into the soft mattress, letting out a noise of content.
#Text=Dozing off again, Rody nearly forgot Midoriya was in the room until he felt a pair of eyes staring at him.
#Text=Turning his head to the side to peek at Midoriya, he realized that the green haired teen had finally let his tears loose, advancing towards the side of the bed and sitting on the floor.
#Text=Without thinking, Rody reached out to wipe his tears, “What’s wrong, Hero?
#Text=Is seeing me again really that bad, eh?”
#Text=He joked, to which Midoriya laughed through his tears, almost nuzzling his face into Rody’s soft hand.
#Text=“No, I—“ He paused, unsure of how to phrase what he was feeling at the moment, “Haha, I’m sorry… I guess I just missed you a lot more than I thought.”
#Text=Rody smiled, gently caressing Midoriya’s cheek with his thumb as he felt his eyelids become heavy, fluttering shut.
#Text=“Yeah… I missed ya too, Hero,” Was all that he let out before drifting into unconsciousness once more.
